keynotes.text: A SYNOPTIC KEY OF THE MATERIA MEDICA By Cyrus Maxwell BOGER Presented by Médi-T REPERTORY NECK (NAPE). Neck (Nape) : Aco., Bar-c., Calc-c., Cimi., Gels., Nux-v., Phyt., Pul., Rhus-t., Sep., Sil., Stap., Tub. Neck (Nape), aching (neckache) : Bry., Cimi., Kalm., Lach., Lil-t., Onos., Par., Phyt. Neck (Nape), constriction , as of a band : Glo., Lach., Sep. Neck (Nape), cracking : Cocc., Nat-c., Petr., Sul. Neck (Nape), cramp : Calc-p., Cic., Cimi., Phyt., Plat., Ver-v. Neck (Nape), emaciation : Mag-c., Nat-m., Sars. Neck (Nape), shooting : Nat-m. Neck (Nape), stiff : Bar-c., Bell., Bry., Calc-c., Caust., Cimi., Ign., Kali-c., Lach., Lyc., Mag-c., Nit-ac., Nux-v., Pho., Rhus-t., Sep., Sil., Stict., Sul. Neck (Nape), sweat : Lach., Mang., Pho-ac., Stan., Sul. Neck (Nape), weakness : Calc-p., Cocc., Plat., Ver-a., Zin. Copyright © Médi-T 1999
